title: Standard Message Envelope
description: Every message that crosses an agent boundary carries this envelope. Source: AGENT_PRODUCT_CYCLE.md §Inter-Agent Communication Standards > Standard Message Envelope.

message_id.description: UUID v4 unique to this message.

trace_id.description: UUID v4 spanning the entire goal lifecycle. Same trace_id is shared across all messages tied to a single originating goal.

from_agent.description: Sending agent identifier in the form agent-id:version (e.g. ceo:1.0.0).

to_agent.description: Receiving agent identifier in the form agent-id:version.

message_type.description: The message_type-specific payload schema is defined in the skill registry.

payload.description: Message-type-specific payload. Schema defined per message_type in the skill registry.
